task: READ-ONLY review of the new source-aware Quickshell content transition. Inspect current StatusData.qml transaction metadata and Bar.qml content motion, plus AppLauncher/UpdateSelector removal of local presented animations. Requirement: internal elements should move based on actual source widget and destination widget, including direct launcher↔updates, open/close to workspaces, cross-monitor moves, same-height transitions, timers, and rapid/interrupted transitions. Check for stuck centerTransitionPending, incorrect intermediate source modes, wrong per-monitor mapping/direction, binding/runtime issues, or regressions in cleanup/exclusivity. Do not edit. Report blockers/medium findings with exact lines, or CLEAN.

criteria.must: Return concrete findings with file paths and severity when applicable
Return concrete findings with file paths and severity when applicable

criteriaSatisfied.evidence: CLEAN review supported by StatusData.qml:497-515 and Bar.qml:210-281; no blocker or medium findings.

commandsRun.command: git status --short && git diff --stat && git diff HEAD -- relevant QML files
commandsRun.summary: Inspected repository state and complete relevant diffs.

commandsRun.command: nl -ba StatusData.qml Bar.qml AppLauncher.qml UpdateSelector.qml and related indicators
commandsRun.summary: Reviewed transaction, monitor mapping, motion, focus, cleanup, and timer paths with line numbers.

commandsRun.command: rg for transition, presented, contentOffset, timer, and overlay call sites
commandsRun.summary: Confirmed centralized motion and removal of local presented animations.

validationOutput: No path was found that leaves centerTransitionPending set during normal synchronous execution.
Nested hides cannot publish intermediate workspace metadata because only the owning outer transaction increments centerTransitionSerial.
Remote source and destination modes map independently to workspaces on each monitor.
Same-height transitions intentionally have zero vertical offset; interrupted motion is stopped before restart.
residualRisks: Live compositor visual behavior and runtime QML diagnostics were not exercised.
childReport.diffSummary: Read-only review of source-aware center transition metadata, shared Bar content motion, monitor mapping, timers, and removal of component-local presented animations.
childReport.manualNotes: The worktree already contained staged and unstaged changes; this review made no edits.
